product_overview: BeatMe is an offline desktop app for daily self-reflection, helping users write one reflection per day and track consistency through visual progress and streak statistics. It also supports local history, draft recovery, and intentional skipping while integrating with desktop shutdown behavior after 10 PM.
core_goals: Write and save one daily reflection locally
Recover unfinished drafts and continue writing later
Track consistency through streaks, totals, and average reflection length
Visualize reflection habits with a yearly heatmap
Intentionally skip a day when needed without writing a reflection
Manage local backups and startup behavior

features.name: Onboarding Welcome Screen
features.description: Introduces first-time users to BeatMe and lets them enter the app experience.
user_flows: Navigate to /welcome -> View the onboarding welcome message -> Finish onboarding -> See the home page

features.name: Daily Reflection Editor
features.description: Lets users write, autosave, save, skip, and recover daily reflections stored locally.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> Type reflection text -> Wait for autosave to occur after inactivity -> Continue using the app
Navigate to /home -> Type reflection text -> Save the reflection -> See the reflection saved for today
Navigate to /home -> Choose to skip today -> Confirm the skip -> See today marked as skipped
Navigate to /home -> Return after an unfinished draft exists -> Restore the previous draft -> Continue editing the recovered reflection
Navigate to /home -> Return after an unfinished draft exists -> Discard the previous draft -> See the draft removed

features.name: Activity Heatmap
features.description: Shows a GitHub-style calendar heatmap of completed and skipped reflection days.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> View the yearly heatmap -> Hover over a day cell -> See the date and reflection status

features.name: Streak and Consistency Stats
features.description: Displays reflection consistency metrics such as streaks, totals, and average length.
user_flows: Navigate to /statistics -> View the statistics dashboard -> Check current streak, longest streak, total reflections, total words, average reflection length, and days missed

features.name: Reflection History & Search
features.description: Allows users to browse, search, and open past reflections in a read-only viewer.
user_flows: Navigate to /history -> Type a keyword in the search field -> View the filtered reflection list
Navigate to /history -> Select a reflection from the list -> View the reflection in read-only mode
Navigate to /history -> Open a reflection in the viewer -> Close the viewer -> Return to the history list

features.name: Backup & Settings Management
features.description: Provides local backup, restore, startup, and data reset controls for the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> Open settings -> Toggle launch on startup -> See the startup preference change
Navigate to /home -> Open settings -> Export the database as a SQLite file -> Save the backup locally
Navigate to /home -> Open settings -> Export the database as a JSON backup -> Save the backup locally
Navigate to /home -> Open settings -> Import a SQLite file or JSON backup -> Confirm the import -> See the restored data
Navigate to /home -> Open settings -> Reset all data -> Confirm the reset -> See all local data cleared

features.name: System Shutdown & Window Close Interception
features.description: Prevents leaving the app after 10 PM when today’s reflection is still pending, and brings the user back to the reflection flow until they save or skip.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> Attempt to close the app after 10 PM with today’s reflection still pending -> See the app remain active and return focus to the reflection flow

Navigate to /home -> Attempt to shut down, restart, or log out after 10 PM with today’s reflection still pending -> See the shutdown delayed and the reflection window presented -> Save the reflection or skip today -> See the shutdown proceed
Navigate to /home -> Attempt to close the app after 10 PM with today’s reflection already completed -> See the app close normally
Navigate to /home -> Attempt to shut down, restart, or log out after 10 PM with today’s reflection already completed or skipped -> See the system action proceed normally

routes.description: Initial onboarding welcome page shown to new users
Default page showing the reflection editor and contribution heatmap
History page with search functionality and list of reflections
Dashboard displaying current/longest streak, average reflection length, and days missed

features.name: Onboarding Welcome Screen
features.description: Welcomes user with the signature prompt "Did you beat yourself today?" on their first launch.
user_interactions: Click on the START button to finish onboarding and access the home page.

features.name: Daily Reflection Editor
features.description: Rich text area for writing daily reflections. Supports autosaving drafts (5-second debounce) and skipping the day.
user_interactions: Type reflection text into the textarea.
Wait for 5 seconds to trigger autosave.
Click Save Reflection button or press Ctrl+S to save.
Click Skip Today button and confirm in the alert dialog to skip writing for today.
Click Restore on the crash recovery banner to load a previous unsaved draft.
Click Discard on the crash recovery banner to delete a previous unsaved draft.

features.name: Streak and Consistency Stats
features.description: Calculates and displays total reflections, current/longest active streaks, average reflection word count, and total days missed.

features.name: Activity Heatmap
features.description: Contributions-style calendar heatmap showing past completed and skipped days.
user_interactions: Hover over cells to see reflection status (completed/skipped) and date.

features.name: Reflection History & Search
features.description: Complete list of past reflections with search functionality and a read-only viewer modal.
user_interactions: Click on a reflection card to open it in a read-only modal.
Press Escape or click close button to close the viewer.

features.name: Backup & Settings Management
features.description: Settings panel to enable/disable autostart, export/import database (SQLite / JSON), and clear all data.
user_interactions: Click Export SQLite File or Export JSON Backup.
Click Import SQLite File or Import JSON Backup and confirm in confirmation dialogs.
Click Reset All Data and confirm in confirmation dialog.

features.name: System Shutdown & Window Close Interception
features.description: Restricts system shutdown and application quitting after 10 PM if the user hasn't written their daily reflection. Employs D-Bus inhibitor locks on Unix/freedesktop platforms.
user_interactions: Close window via title bar (intercepted and hidden, or forced focus if after 10 PM and reflection pending).
Quit application via system tray (intercepted similarly).
Perform system shutdown/reboot/logout (intercepted via D-Bus signal; blocks shutdown, focuses app, displays overlay screen and exits only on reflection save/skip).

known_limitations.impact: System shutdown interception will only work on desktop environments running systemd logind. On Windows/macOS, only standard window events block closure.
Front-end queries use tauri-plugin-sql, while back-end shutdown handlers use direct rusqlite connections on the same database file, requiring WAL mode for concurrent access.
